title: ChainRef
description:
A single coreference chain reference on a word.

Represents one chain that a word participates in. A word can
simultaneously start one chain and end another.

# Bracket notation mapping

| is_start | is_end | notation |
|----------|--------|----------|
| true     | false  | `(N`     |
| false    | true   | `N)`     |
| true     | true   | `(N)`    |
| false    | false  | `N`      |

is_end.description: Whether this word ends a mention in this chain.

is_start.description: Whether this word starts a mention in this chain.
